title: Immune gene expression by individual Culex tarsalis and Aedes aegypti mosquitoes in response to Rift Valley fever virus infection
author: Lewis, Juliette
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Quantitative PCR data collected for immune gene expression in individual mosquito midguts and salivary glands following infection with MP12 strain RVFV.
